overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk industrial district at night. The camera descends from an elevated walkway into streets lined with massive industrial ventilation systems, neon signage, and scattered debris, encountering a single pedestrian and vehicle along the way. The atmosphere is moody with wet pavement reflecting artificial lighting, characteristic of high-quality game engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated concrete walkway descending between industrial structures. Metal railings line both sides of the ramp, with a prominent red industrial wall on the right and neon holographic signs visible in the distance against the night sky. The ground is littered with papers and trash, and the wet surface reflects the artificial lighting.

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the narrow ramp into an open industrial street dominated by large cylindrical storage tanks on the right. A character in reflective clothing briefly runs past from left to right. The camera then turns left to follow the street, revealing overhead industrial pipes and street lamps illuminating the wet asphalt.

segments.scene_description: Walking down a wide industrial avenue beneath an extensive network of overhead pipes and conduits. The street is lined with industrial buildings on both sides, and a pedestrian with an umbrella walks along the right sidewalk. Green dumpsters and scattered trash appear on the left as the camera progresses down the wet, lamp-lit street.

segments.scene_description: The camera walks past green industrial dumpsters while a white pickup truck drives by on the right. The street continues toward a large overhead industrial bridge structure in the distance. Black and yellow bollards line the walkway edge, and an industrial building with large ventilation fans becomes visible on the left.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway beneath a massive overhead industrial bridge. Two enormous ventilation fans dominate the left building facade, accompanied by a yellow danger warning sign. The area feels more enclosed and industrial, with a pedestrian visible walking ahead near the fans. The lighting becomes more dramatic with artificial sources illuminating the misty air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated industrial ramp down into a dense, rain-soaked urban corridor dominated by massive machinery. It begins by descending a concrete walkway lined with metal railings and a red industrial wall, where wet surfaces reflect distant neon holographic signs. As the camera exits the ramp into an open street, the view expands past large cylindrical storage tanks and a running figure in reflective clothing before turning left to follow a wide avenue beneath a network of overhead pipes. The scene then progresses past green dumpsters and a passing white pickup truck, moving toward a looming overhead bridge structure as black and yellow bollards line the path. Finally, the camera enters the enclosed space beneath the bridge, where the atmosphere becomes more dramatic and misty, centering on two enormous ventilation fans and a yellow danger sign on a building facade.
